notes: Design v3.0: Six-component geometric analysis framework for editing-attribution incommensurability (TECS + SVD/PAF + C^{-1} ablation + attribution ablation + toy model + layer profile). Six experiments mapped 1:1 to components. 37-52 GPU-hours within budget. Pilot (Exp-0) gates full execution. NeurIPS 2026 timeline feasible (~8 weeks).
